name: Huasheng International Holding Limited
summary: Huasheng International Holding Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the money lending, household consumables, coal, digital technology, and education businesses. It is involved in the wholesale and retail of household consumables; design and development of three-dimensional animations, as well as augmented reality technology and e-learning web applications; trading of coal products; provision of educational technology solutions through online education programs, as well as English language proficiency tests; and money lending activities. The company also produces and sells ready-mixed commercial concrete; trades in hygienic disposable products; and provides management services. It sells its products primarily in Hong Kong, the United Kingdom, and the People's Republic of China. The company was formerly known as Newtree Group Holdings Limited and changed its name to Huasheng International Holding Limited in March 2020. Huasheng International Holding Limited was incorporated in 2010 and is based in Central, Hong Kong.
